info.name: Gumroad API
info.description:
The Gumroad API, also known as the Gumroad OAuth API, is a RESTful service that allows developers to interact with various aspects of the Gumroad platform, such as products, variant categories, offer codes, custom fields, user information, resource subscriptions, sales, subscribers, and licenses. The API provides methods to retrieve, add, edit, and delete data related to these entities. For more detailed information, visit the [Gumroad API documentation](https://gumroad.com/api).

# Security

The Gumroad API is secured using OAuth 2.0, a widely adopted authorization framework that enables applications to obtain limited access to user accounts on an HTTP service. To start using the API, you need to register your OAuth application on the Gumroad platform. After creating an application, you'll receive a unique application ID and application secret. On the application page, you can generate an access token, which is required for making API calls. For more details on authentication, refer to the [Gumroad API documentation](https://gumroad.com/api).

# How to use this collection

To run the requests in Postman, you need to set up environment variables for the access token. It is recommended to store sensitive information like the access token in the Postman vault instead of environment variables. You can find more about setting up secrets in the [Postman Vault documentation](https://learning.postman.com/docs/sending-requests/postman-vault/postman-vault-secrets/). Below is a table describing the necessary variable:

| Name          | Description                                      |
|---------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| `access_token`| The OAuth 2.0 access token for authenticating API requests. |

variable.description: The unique identifier of the product to be enabled.

request.description:
The `PUT /products/{product_id}/enable` operation in the Gumroad API is used to enable an existing product, making it available for purchase again.

## Response Body

| Name    | Type    | Description                                      |
|---------|---------|--------------------------------------------------|
| success | boolean | Indicates whether the operation was successful.  |
| message | string  | A message confirming the product has been enabled.|

variable.description: The unique identifier of the product to be deleted.

request.description:
The `DELETE /products/{product_id}` operation in the Gumroad API is used to permanently delete a product from your account. This operation is crucial for managing the lifecycle of products, allowing you to remove products that are no longer needed or relevant.

## Response Body

| Name    | Type    | Description                                      |
|---------|---------|--------------------------------------------------|
| success | boolean | Indicates whether the operation was successful.  |
| message | string  | A message confirming the deletion of the product.|

The `GET /products` operation in the Gumroad API retrieves all existing products for the authenticated user. This operation allows you to access detailed information about your products, including pricing, descriptions, and variants.

## Response Body

| Name | Type | Description |
|-------------------------------------------|----------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| success | Boolean | Indicates if the request was successful. |
| products | Array | A list of product objects. |
| products[].id | String | Unique identifier for the product. |
| products[].name | String | Name of the product. |
| products[].description | String | Description of the product. |
| products[].price | Integer | Price of the product in cents. |
| products[].currency | String | Currency code for the product price. |
| products[].url | String | URL to the product page. |
| products[].thumbnail_url | String | URL to the product's thumbnail image. |
| products[].tags | Array | Tags associated with the product. |
| products[].is_tiered_membership | Boolean | Indicates if the product is part of a tiered membership. |
| products[].recurrences | Array | List of available subscription durations if the product is a tiered membership. |
| products[].variants | Array | Variants of the product, each with its own options and pricing. |

request.description:
The `GET /products/{product_id}` operation in the Gumroad API is used to retrieve the details of a specific product. This operation allows you to access comprehensive information about a product, including its description, price, variants, and more.

## Response Body

| Name | Type | Description |
|--------------------------------------------|---------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| success | boolean | Indicates if the request was successful. |
| product | object | Contains detailed information about the product. |
| product.custom_permalink | string | Custom permalink for the product, if any. |
| product.custom_receipt | string | Custom receipt message for the product, if any. |
| product.custom_summary | string | Summary of what the customer will receive. |
| product.custom_fields | array | List of custom fields associated with the product. |
| product.customizable_price | number | Indicates if the price is customizable. |
| product.description | string | Description of the product. |
| product.deleted | boolean | Indicates if the product has been deleted. |
| product.max_purchase_count | number | Maximum number of times the product can be purchased. |
| product.name | string | Name of the product. |
| product.preview_url | string | URL for the product preview, if any. |
| product.require_shipping | boolean | Indicates if shipping is required for the product. |
| product.subscription_duration | string | Duration of the subscription, if applicable. |
| product.published | boolean | Indicates if the product is published. |
| product.url | string | URL of the product. |
| product.id | string | Unique identifier of the product. |
| product.price | number | Price of the product in cents. |
| product.purchasing_power_parity_prices | object | Prices adjusted for purchasing power parity in different regions. |
| product.currency | string | Currency code for the product price. |
| product.short_url | string | Shortened URL for the product. |
| product.thumbnail_url | string | URL of the product's thumbnail image. |
| product.tags | array | Tags associated with the product. |
| product.formatted_price | string | Formatted price of the product. |
| product.file_info | object | Information about the product file. |
| product.sales_count | string | Number of sales for the product (requires 'view_sales' scope). |
| product.sales_usd_cents | string | Total sales in USD cents (requires 'view_sales' scope). |
| product.is_tiered_membership | boolean | Indicates if the product is a tiered membership. |
| product.recurrences | array | Available subscription durations if the product is a tiered membership. |
| product.variants | array | Variants of the product, including options and pricing details. |

request.description:
The `PUT /products/{product_id}/disable` operation is part of the Gumroad OAuth API, which allows you to manage your products on the Gumroad platform. This specific operation is used to disable an existing product, making it unavailable for purchase. Disabling a product can be useful when you want to temporarily remove a product from your store without permanently deleting it.

| product.preview_url | null | Preview URL of the product. |
| product.require_shipping | boolean | Indicates if shipping is required. |
| product.subscription_duration | null | Duration of the subscription. |
| product.published | boolean | Indicates if the product is published. |
| product.url | string | URL of the product. |
| product.id | string | ID of the product. |
| product.price | number | Price of the product in cents. |
| product.currency | string | Currency of the product price. |
| product.short_url | string | Short URL of the product. |
| product.thumbnail_url | string | Thumbnail URL of the product. |
| product.tags | array | Tags associated with the product. |
| product.formatted_price | string | Formatted price of the product. |
| product.file_info | object | File information of the product. |

variable.description: The unique identifier of the product whose variant categories are being retrieved.

request.description:
The `GET /products/{product_id}/variant_categories` operation retrieves the variant categories associated with a specific product in the Gumroad platform. This endpoint is part of the Gumroad OAuth API, which allows developers to interact with various resources on the Gumroad platform. The purpose of this operation is to provide you with detailed information about the different variant categories available for a given product, enabling you to understand and manage product variations effectively.

## Response Body

| Name                | Type    | Description                                                                 |
|---------------------|---------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| success             | boolean | Indicates whether the request was successful.                               |
| variant_categories  | array   | A list of variant categories for the product. Each category includes details such as title and options. |

response.name: Retrieve Variant Categories

request.description:
The `GET /products/{product_id}/variant_categories/{id}` operation retrieves the details of a specific variant category associated with a product in the Gumroad platform. This endpoint is part of the Gumroad OAuth API, which allows developers to interact with various resources on the Gumroad platform. The purpose of this operation is to provide detailed information about a particular variant category, which can include options and pricing variations for a product.

## Response Body

| Name                      | Type   | Description                                      |
|---------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------|
| success                   | bool   | Indicates if the request was successful.          |
| variant_category          | object | Contains details of the variant category.         |
| variant_category.id       | string | The unique identifier of the variant category.    |
| variant_category.title    | string | The title of the variant category.                |

response.name: Retrieve Variant Category Details

request.description:
The `DELETE /products/{product_id}/variant_categories/{id}` operation allows you to permanently delete a specific variant category associated with a product. By providing the product ID and the variant category ID, you can remove unwanted or obsolete variant categories from your product listings.

## Response Body

| Name    | Type    | Description                                      |
|---------|---------|--------------------------------------------------|
| success | boolean | Indicates whether the deletion was successful.   |
| message | string  | A message confirming the deletion.               |

variable.description: The unique identifier of the product

request.description:
The `POST /products/{product_id}/variant_categories` operation allows you to create a new variant category for a specific product in the Gumroad platform. By using this endpoint, you can add different categories of variants to a product, enhancing the product's customization options.

## Request Body

| Name             | Type   | Required | Description                                      |
|------------------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------|
| name             | string | Yes      | The name of the variant category                 |
| options          | array  | Yes      | An array of options available under this category|
| options[].name   | string | Yes      | The name of each option within the category      |
| options[].price_diff | number | No       | Price difference for each option (if applicable) |

## Response Body

| Name                     | Type   | Description                                      |
|--------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------|
| success                  | bool   | Indicates if the operation was successful         |
| variant_category         | object | Details of the created variant category           |
| variant_category.id      | string | The unique identifier of the variant category     |
| variant_category.name    | string | The name of the variant category                  |
| variant_category.options | array  | The options available under this category         |

response.name: 201 Created

variable.description: The unique identifier of the product

request.description:
The `PUT /products/{product_id}/variant_categories/{id}` operation in the Gumroad API is used to update an existing variant category for a specific product. This operation allows you to modify details of a variant category associated with a product, enabling effective management of product variations.

## Request Body

| Name                  | Type   | Required | Description                                |
|-----------------------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------|
| name                  | string | Yes      | The new name for the variant category.     |
| options               | array  | Yes      | An array of options for the variant category. |
| options[].name        | string | Yes      | The name of the option within the variant. |
| options[].price_difference | integer | No       | Price difference for the option.           |

## Response Body

| Name                  | Type    | Description                                      |
|-----------------------|---------|--------------------------------------------------|
| success               | boolean | Indicates if the operation was successful.       |
| message               | string  | A message describing the outcome of the operation.|

response.name: Update Variant Category

request.description:
The `POST /products/{product_id}/variant_categories/{variant_category_id}/variants` operation in the Gumroad API allows you to add a new variant to an existing variant category for a specific product. This operation is essential for sellers who want to offer different options or variations of a product, such as size or color.

## Request Body

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| name | string | Yes | The name of the variant. |
| price_difference | number | No | The price difference from the base product price. |
| purchasing_power_parity_prices.US | number | No | Price for US market based on purchasing power parity. |
| purchasing_power_parity_prices.IN | number | No | Price for Indian market based on purchasing power parity. |
| purchasing_power_parity_prices.EC | number | No | Price for Ecuadorian market based on purchasing power parity. |

## Response Body

| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| success | bool | Indicates if the operation was successful. |
| variant.id | string | The unique identifier of the newly created variant. |
| variant.name | string | The name of the variant. |
| variant.price_difference | number | The price difference from the base product price. |

response.name: Adding a New Variant

request.description:
The `GET /products/{product_id}/variant_categories/{variant_category_id}/variants/{id}` operation in the Gumroad API is used to retrieve detailed information about a specific variant of a product. This endpoint allows you to access variant-specific data within a given product and variant category, providing insights into the variant's attributes and configurations.

## Response Body

| Name                      | Type   | Description                                      |
|---------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------|
| `success`                 | bool   | Indicates if the request was successful.         |
| `variant`                 | object | Contains the details of the variant.             |
| `variant.name`            | string | The name of the variant.                         |
| `variant.price_difference_cents` | int    | The price difference for this variant.           |
| `variant.options`         | array  | List of options available for this variant.      |

response.name: Retrieve Variant Details

request.description:
The `DELETE /products/:product_id/variant_categories/:variant_category_id/variants/:id` operation allows you to permanently delete a specific variant from a product's variant category in the Gumroad platform. This is useful for managing and maintaining the variants associated with a product, ensuring that only relevant and current options are available to customers.

## Response Body

| Name    | Type    | Description                                      |
|---------|---------|--------------------------------------------------|
| success | boolean | Indicates whether the deletion was successful.   |
| message | string  | A message confirming the deletion of the variant.|

item.name: Retrieve Variants of a Product's Variant Category

request.description:
The `GET /products/{product_id}/variant_categories/{variant_category_id}/variants` operation retrieves all variants associated with a specific variant category of a product in the Gumroad platform. This operation is part of the Gumroad OAuth API, which allows developers to interact with various resources on the Gumroad platform. The purpose of this operation is to provide detailed information about the different variants available under a specified variant category for a given product.

## Response Body

| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `success` | bool | Indicates whether the request was successful. |
| `variants` | array | An array of variant objects, each representing a different option available under the specified variant category. |
| `variants[].id` | string | The unique identifier of the variant. |
| `variants[].name` | string | The name of the variant. |
| `variants[].price_difference` | integer | The price difference of the variant compared to the base product price. |

response.name: Retrieve Variants of a Product's Variant Category

request.description:
The `PUT /products/{product_id}/variant_categories/{variant_category_id}/variants/{id}` operation in the Gumroad API is used to update an existing variant of a product. This operation allows you to modify details of a specific variant within a variant category for a given product.

## Request Body

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---------------------------|--------|----------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `name` | string | No | The new name of the variant. |
| `price_difference` | number | No | The price difference from the base product price. |
| `purchasing_power_parity_prices.US` | number | No | Price adjusted for purchasing power parity in the US. |
| `purchasing_power_parity_prices.IN` | number | No | Price adjusted for purchasing power parity in India. |
| `purchasing_power_parity_prices.EC` | number | No | Price adjusted for purchasing power parity in Ecuador. |
| `is_pay_what_you_want` | boolean| No | Indicates if the variant is pay-what-you-want. |
| `recurrence_prices.monthly.price_cents` | number | No | Monthly price in cents for membership products. |
| `recurrence_prices.monthly.suggested_price_cents` | number | No | Suggested monthly price in cents if pay-what-you-want is true. |

## Response Body

| Name | Type | Description |
|---------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `success` | boolean| Indicates whether the update was successful. |
| `variant` | object | Contains the updated variant details. |
| `variant.name` | string | The updated name of the variant. |
| `variant.price_difference`| number | The updated price difference from the base product price. |
| `variant.purchasing_power_parity_prices.US` | number | Updated price adjusted for purchasing power parity in the US. |
| `variant.purchasing_power_parity_prices.IN` | number | Updated price adjusted for purchasing power parity in India. |
| `variant.purchasing_power_parity_prices.EC` | number | Updated price adjusted for purchasing power parity in Ecuador. |
| `variant.is_pay_what_you_want` | boolean | Updated indication if the variant is pay-what-you-want. |
| `variant.recurrence_prices.monthly.price_cents` | number | Updated monthly price in cents for membership products. |
| `variant.recurrence_prices.monthly.suggested_price_cents` | number | Updated suggested monthly price in cents if pay-what-you-want is true. |

The `GET /user` operation in the Gumroad API retrieves information about the authenticated user, including their public profile details and associated data. This is a read-only operation that provides insights into the user's account on Gumroad.

## Response Body

| Name          | Type   | Description                                           |
|---------------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| user.id       | String | Unique identifier for the user.                       |
| user.name     | String | The name of the user.                                 |

request.description:
The `GET /subscribers/{subscriber_id}` operation retrieves the details of a subscriber to a user's product. This operation is part of the Gumroad API, also referred to as the Gumroad Oauth API. It allows you to access detailed information about a specific subscriber by providing the subscriber's unique identifier.

## Response Body

| Name | Type | Description |
|-------------------------------------|---------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| success | boolean | Indicates if the request was successful. |
| subscribers.id | string | The unique identifier of the subscriber. |
| subscribers.product_id | string | The unique identifier of the product the subscriber is associated with. |
| subscribers.product_name | string | The name of the product the subscriber is associated with. |
| subscribers.user_id | string | The unique identifier of the user (subscriber). |
| subscribers.user_email | string | The email address of the subscriber. |
| subscribers.purchase_ids | array | An array of purchase identifiers associated with the subscriber. |
| subscribers.created_at | string | The timestamp when the subscription was created. |
| subscribers.user_requested_cancellation_at | string | The timestamp when the user requested cancellation, if applicable. |
| subscribers.charge_occurrence_count | integer | The number of times the charge has occurred, if applicable. |
| subscribers.recurrence | string | The recurrence pattern of the subscription (e.g., monthly). |
| subscribers.cancelled_at | string | The timestamp when the subscription was cancelled, if applicable. |
| subscribers.ended_at | string | The timestamp when the subscription ended, if applicable. |
| subscribers.failed_at | string | The timestamp when the subscription failed, if applicable. |
| subscribers.free_trial_ends_at | string | The timestamp when the free trial ends, if applicable. |
| subscribers.license_key | string | The license key associated with the subscription. |
| subscribers.status | string | The current status of the subscription (e.g., alive, pending_cancellation). |

request.description:
The `GET /products/{product_id}/subscribers` operation retrieves all active subscribers for a specific product of the authenticated user. This operation allows you to filter subscribers by email and paginate results if needed. A subscription is considered terminated if any of the `failed_at`, `ended_at`, or `cancelled_at` timestamps are populated and are in the past. The status of a subscription can be one of several states, including `alive`, `pending_cancellation`, `pending_failure`, `failed_payment`, `fixed_subscription_period_ended`, or `cancelled`.

## Response Body

| Name | Type | Description |
|-------------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| success | boolean| Indicates whether the request was successful. |
| next_page_url | string | URL for the next page of results, if pagination is enabled. |
| next_page_key | string | Key for the next page of results, used for pagination. |
| subscribers | array | List of subscriber objects. |
| subscribers.id | string | Unique identifier for the subscriber. |
| subscribers.product_id | string | Identifier of the product the subscriber is associated with. |
| subscribers.product_name | string | Name of the product the subscriber is associated with. |
| subscribers.user_id | string | Unique identifier for the user (subscriber). |
| subscribers.user_email | string | Email address of the subscriber. |
| subscribers.purchase_ids | array | List of purchase identifiers associated with the subscriber. |
| subscribers.created_at | string | Timestamp when the subscription was created. |
| subscribers.user_requested_cancellation_at | string | Timestamp when the user requested cancellation, if applicable. |
| subscribers.charge_occurrence_count | integer| Number of times the charge has occurred. |
| subscribers.recurrence | string | Recurrence pattern of the subscription (e.g., monthly). |
| subscribers.cancelled_at | string | Timestamp when the subscription was cancelled, if applicable. |
| subscribers.ended_at | string | Timestamp when the subscription ended, if applicable. |
| subscribers.failed_at | string | Timestamp when the subscription failed, if applicable. |
| subscribers.free_trial_ends_at | string | Timestamp when the free trial ends, if applicable. |
| subscribers.license_key | string | License key associated with the subscription. |
| subscribers.status | string | Current status of the subscription (e.g., alive, pending_cancellation). |

request.description:
The `POST /licenses/verify` operation in the Gumroad API is used to verify a license key for a specific product. This operation checks the validity of a customer's license key and returns information about the purchase associated with that license.

## Request Body

| Name                  | Type   | Required | Description                                                        |
|-----------------------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|
| product_id            | String | Yes      | The unique ID of the product, available on the product's edit page.|
| license_key           | String | Yes      | The license key provided by your customer.                         |
| increment_uses_count  | String | No       | Optional parameter to indicate whether to increment the usage count. Defaults to "true". |

## Response Body

| Name                           | Type    | Description                                                      |
|--------------------------------|---------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
| success                        | Boolean | Indicates if the license verification was successful.            |
| uses                           | Integer | The number of times the license has been used.                   |
| purchase                       | Object  | Contains detailed information about the purchase associated with the license. |
| purchase.seller_id             | String  | The ID of the seller.                                            |
| purchase.product_id            | String  | The ID of the product.                                           |
| purchase.product_name          | String  | The name of the product.                                         |
| purchase.permalink             | String  | The permalink of the product.                                    |
| purchase.product_permalink     | String  | The full URL to the product page.                                |
| purchase.email                 | String  | The email of the purchaser.                                      |
| purchase.price                 | Integer | The price of the product.                                        |
| purchase.gumroad_fee           | Integer | The fee charged by Gumroad.                                      |
| purchase.currency              | String  | The currency of the transaction.                                 |
| purchase.quantity              | Integer | The quantity purchased.                                          |
| purchase.discover_fee_charged  | Boolean | Indicates if a discover fee was charged.                         |
| purchase.can_contact           | Boolean | Indicates if the seller can contact the purchaser.               |
| purchase.referrer              | String  | The referrer of the purchase.                                    |
| purchase.card                  | Object  | Information about the card used for the purchase.                |
| purchase.order_number          | Integer | The order number of the purchase.                                |
| purchase.sale_id               | String  | The sale ID of the purchase.                                     |
| purchase.sale_timestamp        | String  | The timestamp of the sale.                                       |
| purchase.purchaser_id          | String  | The ID of the purchaser.                                         |
| purchase.subscription_id       | String  | The subscription ID if applicable.                               |
| purchase.variants              | String  | Any variants of the product purchased.                           |
| purchase.license_key           | String  | The license key associated with the purchase.                    |
| purchase.is_multiseat_license  | Boolean | Indicates if the license is a multiseat license.                 |
| purchase.ip_country            | String  | The country of the IP address used for the purchase.             |
| purchase.recurrence            | String  | The recurrence of the purchase (e.g., monthly).                  |
| purchase.is_gift_receiver_purchase | Boolean | Indicates if the purchase was a gift.                            |
| purchase.refunded              | Boolean | Indicates if the purchase was refunded.                          |
| purchase.disputed              | Boolean | Indicates if the purchase was disputed.                          |
| purchase.dispute_won           | Boolean | Indicates if the dispute was won.                                |
| purchase.id                    | String  | The ID of the purchase.                                          |
| purchase.created_at            | String  | The creation date of the purchase.                               |
| purchase.custom_fields         | Array   | Custom fields associated with the purchase.                      |
| purchase.chargebacked          | Boolean | Indicates if the purchase was chargebacked.                      |
| purchase.subscription_ended_at | String  | The end date of the subscription if applicable.                  |
| purchase.subscription_cancelled_at | String | The cancellation date of the subscription if applicable.         |
| purchase.subscription_failed_at | String | The failure date of the subscription if applicable.              |

request.description:
The "Enable a license" operation in the Gumroad API is used to activate a previously disabled license key for a specific product. This operation allows you to re-enable access to digital products for customers who have valid licenses but were previously unable to use them due to the license being disabled.

## Request Body

| Name          | Type   | Required | Description                                      |
|---------------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------|
| access_token  | String | Yes      | The access token for authenticating the API request. |
| product_id    | String | Yes      | The unique ID of the product associated with the license. |
| license_key   | String | Yes      | The license key provided by the customer.        |

## Response Body

| Name                          | Type    | Description                                                  |
|-------------------------------|---------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| success                       | Boolean | Indicates whether the operation was successful.              |
| uses                          | Integer | The number of times the license has been used.               |
| purchase                      | Object  | Details about the purchase associated with the license.      |
| purchase.seller_id            | String  | The ID of the seller.                                        |
| purchase.product_id           | String  | The ID of the product.                                       |
| purchase.product_name         | String  | The name of the product.                                     |
| purchase.permalink            | String  | The permalink of the product.                                |
| purchase.product_permalink    | String  | The full URL of the product's page.                          |
| purchase.email                | String  | The email of the customer.                                   |
| purchase.price                | Integer | The price of the product.                                    |
| purchase.gumroad_fee          | Integer | The fee charged by Gumroad.                                  |
| purchase.currency             | String  | The currency of the transaction.                             |
| purchase.quantity             | Integer | The quantity purchased.                                      |
| purchase.discover_fee_charged | Boolean | Indicates if a discover fee was charged.                     |
| purchase.can_contact          | Boolean | Indicates if the seller can contact the customer.            |
| purchase.referrer             | String  | The referrer of the purchase.                                |
| purchase.card                 | Object  | Information about the card used for the purchase.            |
| purchase.order_number         | Integer | The order number of the purchase.                            |
| purchase.sale_id              | String  | The sale ID of the purchase.                                 |
| purchase.sale_timestamp       | String  | The timestamp of the sale.                                   |
| purchase.purchaser_id         | String  | The ID of the purchaser.                                     |
| purchase.subscription_id      | String  | The subscription ID if applicable.                           |

| purchase.license_key          | String  | The license key associated with the purchase.                |
| purchase.is_multiseat_license | Boolean | Indicates if the license is a multiseat license.             |
| purchase.ip_country           | String  | The country of the IP address used for the purchase.         |
| purchase.recurrence           | String  | The recurrence type of the purchase (e.g., monthly).         |
| purchase.is_gift_receiver_purchase | Boolean | Indicates if the purchase was a gift receiver purchase. |
| purchase.refunded             | Boolean | Indicates if the purchase was refunded.                      |
